steps.title: Find the volume of the cube
steps.content:
For a cube with edge length $a = 4.000$ cm, calculate:
$$V = (4.000)^3 = 64.000 \text{ cm}^3$$

steps.title: Apply the density formula to find mass
steps.content:
Use the relationship between mass, density, and volume. Substitute the known values:
$$\text{mass} = 0.180 \text{ g/cm}^3 \times 64.000 \text{ cm}^3 = 11.52 \text{ grams}$$
The mass of the cube is 11.52 grams.
